objective: Plan the optional managed wallet account, session, recovery, review, WebAuthn, typed-subject, and portable grant overlay after sovereign-local completion.
falsifiable_claim: Principal, session, origin, request, representation, ceremony, subject, and grant substitutions refuse; recovery grants nothing; and the same System can attach and detach without hidden dependence.
exit_criteria: Principal, session, origin, request, representation, ceremony, subject, and grant substitutions refuse.
Recovery preserves no grant and the same System completes managed attach and detach without hidden dependency.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M9_MANAGED_OPTIONALITY_OVERLAY_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Cross-substitute principal, session, origin, relying party, request hash, representation, ceremony, typed subject, guardian, factor, grant, effect, recovery, attach, and detach state.
remaining_nonclaims: Portable authority is claimed only for the admitted overlay.
No blanket passkey-understanding, required-managed-service, or stage closure claim.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 69592149186cb29383a397ad0aa3ad6f5ab4ab7b; status transaction 2026-07-22.
